policy: New production modules under src/ must be explicitly classified before merge. Existing legacy modules are grandfathered until the full ARCH106 inventory pass is completed. The unclassified legacy baseline must not grow.

src/adaptive_expectancy.py.notes: ARCH106 Step 4a: adaptive expectancy research layer. Not marked connected_runtime until a live runtime execution proof exists.

src/advanced_backtesting_v2.py.notes: ARCH106 Step 4a: research validation/backtesting layer. Not marked connected_runtime until a live runtime execution proof exists.

src/analytics/backtesting.py.notes: ARCH106 Step 4b: simple analytics/backtesting helper. Not marked connected_runtime until a live runtime execution proof exists.

src/analytics/walk_forward_validation.py.notes: ARCH106 Step 4b: analytics walk-forward validation helper. Not marked connected_runtime until a live runtime execution proof exists.

src/analytics/performance_tracker.py.notes: ARCH106 Step 4b: analytics performance statistics helper. Not marked connected_runtime until a live runtime execution proof exists.

src/analytics/signal_quality.py.notes: ARCH106 Step 4b: analytics signal quality helper. Not marked connected_runtime until a live runtime execution proof exists.

src/signals/signal_generator.py.notes: Report/signal runtime path is CI-proven in ARCH106 Step 1.

src/signals/scanner_metrics_pipeline.py.notes: DATA1 diagnostics are normalized and passed into signal generation on the report path.

src/reporting/decision_report.py.notes: Decision report is exercised by the report/signal runtime path.

src/reporting/market_regime.py.notes: Market regime summary is exercised by the report/signal runtime path.

src/reporting/screener_engine.py.notes: Screener snapshot is exercised by the report/signal runtime path.
